subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter from Baghdad hath been received. Praise be unto God, under the shadow of divine favors thou hast journeyed to Iraq [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما از بغداد رسید الحمد لله در ظل عنایت مسافرت بعراق و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
